banner.text: Strona jest dostępna w języku polskim. Kontynuuj po polsku lub zmień ustawienia w stopce.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills.

cookie.bannerMsg: We use cookies on our website to provide you with the best experience. You can learn more about cookies from which we use in our privacy policy.
cookie.modalBody: We use cookies to make our website more user-friendly and to work without you. Below you can check what data we collect from cookies and how we collect it. You can always change your choice in the steps you find on the footer of each page.

necessary.title: Necessary cookies
necessary.description: Are necessary for the proper functioning of the website. We save, for example, the state of the agreement to the various cookies.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.description: Anonymized data analytics that we can use to know your behavior and needs. We save, for example, how often you visit our website and how long you spend on it.
